query: SELECT section, contentKey, contentValue FROM siteContent WHERE section = 'hero' ORDER BY contentKey;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LjqDmVpjTdU4x3.f803f9e43b11 --database nfjRiEndnKWe5mynUDANL9 --execute SELECT section, contentKey, contentValue FROM siteContent WHERE section = 'hero' ORDER BY contentKey;

rows.contentValue: Curated products to support your journey of transformation
